review_questions: Does the implementation stay inside P3-IMPL-SOURCE and avoid product capability expansion?
Does it preserve source_snapshot.py and source_snapshot_manifest schema compatibility?
Do external links, visual sources, rejected sources, and expansion-required sources remain blocked from eligible semantic authority?
Do tests and full regression pass without invalidating P2 BUILD readiness hashes?
resolved_decision: P3-IMPL-SOURCE approved by Human Gate; P3-IMPL-DISTILL remains separately gated by explicit continuation.
